title: taraxacum fibratum
intro: Taraxacum fibratum, commonly known as the meadow dandelion or lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum fibratum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
